# Hair by Abi

> Independent hair stylist in Ponchatoula, Louisiana. Cuts, color, balayage, color corrections, and bridal styling for the Northshore.

Hair by Abi is a one-chair salon serving Ponchatoula, Hammond, Amite, and the surrounding Tangipahoa Parish area. The stylist, Abi, specializes in dimensional color, color correction, and balayage built to survive Louisiana humidity, alongside bridal and special-occasion styling.

## Services
- Cut & Style — consultation, cut, wash, and finished blowout
- Color — single-process, root touch-ups, gloss, tonal refresh
- Balayage & Highlights — hand-painted dimension and classic foil work
- Bridal & Special Occasion — trials and on-site styling for the Northshore
- Vivid & Specialty Color — peekaboos, money pieces, hair tinsel, full vivids
- Color Correction — multi-step, consultation required

## Service Area
- Ponchatoula, LA (primary)
- Hammond, LA
- Amite, LA
- Tangipahoa Parish
- Northshore region

## Booking
Bookings are managed through Square Appointments at the salon's booking link. Deposits, where required, are collected at checkout.
